message:
feat(safety): persist safety configs and violations to database

Migrate safety service from in-memory-only storage to database-backed
persistence using Drizzle ORM. Rate limit counters remain in-memory for
performance since they're high-frequency and ephemeral.

Safety service changes:
- Add safetyConfigs, safetyRules, safetyViolations tables
- persistConfig() upserts configurations with all rules
- Violations are recorded to DB for audit trail
- Budget usage tracked in budgetUsage table
- Simplified cleanup job (only handles rate limits now)
- getMemoryStats() now only reports rate limit entries

Agent service improvements:
- Add initializeAgentService() for restart recovery
- Restores active agents from DB on gateway startup
- Agents unreachable via driver are marked terminated
- Hydrates state machines and resumes event monitoring
- Initializes auto-checkpointing for restored agents

Also includes:
- Agent state machine new states for recovery flow
- NTM ingest and WS bridge improvements
- Reservation conflict detection enhancements
- Cost tracker service refinements

This enables the gateway to survive restarts without losing agent state
or safety configuration, critical for production deployments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
